note: PR A placeholder catalog — 12 work types total (3 per domain). Phase 2.x PR-1: per-item scenarios/mitigations/ppe added inside each baseline. v0.3.0: 4언어(en/vi/th/id) 번역 추가, ko 원문 유지. regulation 인용은 felix 검수 필요.

WORKING_AT_HEIGHT.label_th: ทำงานบนที่สูง

baseline.content: 안전대 착용 및 생명줄(수평/수직) 연결 확인
baseline.content_en: Confirm full-body harness donned and lifeline (horizontal/vertical) connected
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra dây an toàn toàn thân đã đeo và dây cứu sinh (ngang/dọc) đã móc
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบการสวมเข็มขัดนิรภัยแบบเต็มตัวและการเชื่อมต่อ lifeline (แนวนอน/แนวตั้ง)
baseline.content_id: Pastikan full body harness terpasang dan lifeline (horizontal/vertikal) terhubung

scenarios.content: 안전대 미체결 작업자가 균형 상실 시 추락 (4m 이상)
scenarios.content_en: Worker without harness hooked loses balance and falls (over 4m)
scenarios.content_vi: Công nhân không móc dây an toàn mất thăng bằng và rơi (trên 4m)
scenarios.content_th: ผู้ปฏิบัติงานที่ไม่ได้คล้องเข็มขัดเสียการทรงตัวและตกจากที่สูง (เกิน 4 เมตร)
scenarios.content_id: Pekerja yang tidak mengaitkan harness kehilangan keseimbangan dan jatuh (lebih dari 4m)

mitigations.content: 작업 시작 전 인원별 생명줄 체결 상태 1:1 확인 (추정: KOSHA G-49, felix 검수 필요)
mitigations.content_en: Verify each worker's lifeline attachment 1:1 before work starts
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra 1:1 tình trạng móc dây cứu sinh của từng người trước khi bắt đầu công việc
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบสถานะการคล้อง lifeline ของแต่ละคนแบบ 1:1 ก่อนเริ่มงาน
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi 1:1 status pengaitan lifeline setiap pekerja sebelum mulai bekerja

ppe.content_vi: Dây an toàn toàn thân (tích hợp dây cứu sinh)
ppe.content_th: เข็มขัดนิรภัยแบบเต็มตัว (รวม lifeline)

baseline.content_en: Inspect work platform and safety guardrails
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra tình trạng lắp đặt sàn thao tác và lan can an toàn
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบสภาพการติดตั้งแผ่นรองทำงานและราวกันตก
baseline.content_id: Periksa kondisi pemasangan platform kerja dan railing pengaman

scenarios.content: 작업발판 미끄러짐 또는 결속 풀림으로 균형 상실 → 추락
scenarios.content_en: Platform slip or loose fastening causes loss of balance and fall
scenarios.content_vi: Sàn thao tác trượt hoặc dây buộc lỏng gây mất thăng bằng và rơi
scenarios.content_th: แผ่นรองลื่นหรือการผูกหลวมทำให้เสียการทรงตัวและตก
scenarios.content_id: Platform tergelincir atau ikatan lepas menyebabkan kehilangan keseimbangan dan jatuh

mitigations.content: 발판 폭 40cm 이상 + 안전난간 90cm 설치 확인 후 작업 시작
mitigations.content_en: Start work only after confirming platform width 40cm+ and guardrail 90cm height
mitigations.content_vi: Chỉ bắt đầu công việc sau khi xác nhận sàn rộng từ 40cm và lan can cao 90cm
mitigations.content_th: เริ่มงานหลังจากยืนยันว่าความกว้างแผ่นรอง 40 ซม. ขึ้นไปและราวกันตกสูง 90 ซม.
mitigations.content_id: Mulai bekerja hanya setelah memastikan lebar platform 40cm+ dan railing setinggi 90cm

ppe.content_th: รองเท้านิรภัยกันลื่น

baseline.content: 추락방지망 설치 또는 개구부 덮개 확인
baseline.content_en: Confirm fall-arrest net installed or floor opening covered
baseline.content_vi: Xác nhận lưới chống rơi đã lắp hoặc nắp che lỗ mở sàn
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบการติดตั้งตาข่ายกันตกหรือฝาปิดช่องเปิด
baseline.content_id: Pastikan jaring pengaman jatuh terpasang atau penutup lubang lantai

scenarios.content: 개구부 덮개 미설치로 작업자/자재가 하부층으로 추락
scenarios.content_en: Worker or material falls to lower floor through uncovered opening
scenarios.content_vi: Công nhân hoặc vật liệu rơi xuống tầng dưới qua lỗ mở không có nắp che
scenarios.content_th: ผู้ปฏิบัติงานหรือวัสดุตกลงชั้นล่างผ่านช่องเปิดที่ไม่มีฝาปิด
scenarios.content_id: Pekerja atau material jatuh ke lantai bawah melalui lubang yang tidak ditutup

mitigations.content: 개구부 덮개 고정 + 추락방지망(10m 이내) 이중 설치
mitigations.content_en: Fix opening cover plus install fall-arrest net (within 10m) as a double layer
mitigations.content_vi: Cố định nắp che lỗ mở và lắp lưới chống rơi (trong vòng 10m) thành 2 lớp
mitigations.content_th: ยึดฝาปิดช่องเปิดและติดตั้งตาข่ายกันตก (ภายใน 10 เมตร) แบบสองชั้น
mitigations.content_id: Pasang penutup lubang dan jaring pengaman jatuh (dalam 10m) sebagai lapisan ganda

ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย (รัดสายคาง)

baseline.content: 사다리·이동식 비계 사용 시 전도 방지 조치
baseline.content_en: Take tip-over prevention measures when using ladders or mobile scaffolds
baseline.content_vi: Áp dụng biện pháp chống đổ khi sử dụng thang hoặc giàn giáo di động
baseline.content_th: ใช้มาตรการป้องกันการล้มเมื่อใช้บันไดหรือนั่งร้านเคลื่อนที่
baseline.content_id: Terapkan langkah pencegahan terjungkal saat menggunakan tangga atau scaffold mobile
baseline.regulation: 추정: KOSHA G-49, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 이동식 비계 캐스터 미고정 상태에서 작업자 이동 시 전도
scenarios.content_en: Mobile scaffold tips over when worker moves with casters unlocked
scenarios.content_vi: Giàn giáo di động bị đổ khi công nhân di chuyển mà bánh xe chưa khóa
scenarios.content_th: นั่งร้านเคลื่อนที่ล้มเมื่อผู้ปฏิบัติงานเคลื่อนตัวขณะล้อยังไม่ล็อก
scenarios.content_id: Scaffold mobile terjungkal saat pekerja bergerak dengan caster tidak terkunci

mitigations.content: 캐스터 4개 모두 잠금 + 아웃리거 전개 후 승강
mitigations.content_en: Lock all 4 casters and deploy outriggers before climbing
mitigations.content_vi: Khóa cả 4 bánh xe và mở chân chống outrigger trước khi leo lên
mitigations.content_th: ล็อกล้อทั้ง 4 และกาง outrigger ก่อนปีนขึ้น
mitigations.content_id: Kunci keempat caster dan rentangkan outrigger sebelum menaiki

baseline.content_en: Prevent tool and material drops (tool lanyard, debris net)
baseline.content_vi: Ngăn rơi dụng cụ và vật liệu (dây buộc dụng cụ, lưới chống rơi vật)
baseline.content_th: ป้องกันเครื่องมือและวัสดุตก (สายรัดเครื่องมือ ตาข่ายกันของตก)
baseline.content_id: Cegah jatuhnya alat dan material (tool lanyard, jaring penangkap puing)

scenarios.content: 공구 낙하로 하부 작업자/통행자 충격 부상
scenarios.content_en: Falling tool strikes worker or passerby below causing injury
scenarios.content_vi: Dụng cụ rơi va đập gây thương tích cho công nhân/người đi bên dưới
scenarios.content_th: เครื่องมือตกกระแทกผู้ปฏิบัติงานหรือผู้สัญจรด้านล่างได้รับบาดเจ็บ
scenarios.content_id: Alat yang jatuh menghantam pekerja atau pejalan kaki di bawah dan menyebabkan cedera

mitigations.content: 공구벨트 스트랩 체결 + 낙하물 방지망 1차/2차 설치
mitigations.content_en: Fasten tool belt strap and install primary/secondary debris nets
mitigations.content_vi: Cài dây thắt lưng dụng cụ và lắp lưới chống rơi vật lớp 1 và lớp 2
mitigations.content_th: ติดสายเข็มขัดเครื่องมือและติดตั้งตาข่ายกันของตกชั้นที่ 1 และ 2
mitigations.content_id: Pasang tali tool belt dan jaring penangkap puing lapisan 1 dan 2

ppe.content_vi: Thắt lưng đựng dụng cụ (tích hợp dây buộc)
ppe.content_th: เข็มขัดเครื่องมือ (รวมสายรัด)

add.content: 강풍주의(10m/s 이상) — 작업속도 제한, 신호수 추가
add.content_en: Strong wind caution (10m/s+) — limit work pace, add signal person
add.content_vi: Cảnh báo gió mạnh (từ 10m/s) — giới hạn tốc độ làm việc, thêm người ra hiệu
add.content_th: ระวังลมแรง (10 ม./วินาทีขึ้นไป) — จำกัดความเร็วงาน เพิ่มผู้ให้สัญญาณ
add.content_id: Peringatan angin kencang (10m/s+) — batasi kecepatan kerja, tambah signal man
add.regulation: 추정: KOSHA G-99, felix 검수 필요

add.content: 강풍 작업중단(15m/s 이상) — 외부 고소작업 금지
add.content_en: Stop work in high wind (15m/s+) — outdoor work-at-height prohibited
add.content_vi: Ngừng việc khi gió mạnh (từ 15m/s) — cấm làm việc trên cao ngoài trời
add.content_th: หยุดงานเมื่อลมแรง (15 ม./วินาทีขึ้นไป) — ห้ามทำงานบนที่สูงภายนอกอาคาร
add.content_id: Hentikan pekerjaan saat angin tinggi (15m/s+) — kerja di ketinggian luar ruangan dilarang

HOT_WORK.label_th: งานที่ใช้ความร้อน/ประกายไฟ

baseline.content: 화기작업 허가서(PTW) 발급 및 유효기간 확인
baseline.content_en: Confirm hot work permit (PTW) issued and within validity period
baseline.content_vi: Xác nhận giấy phép công việc sinh nhiệt (PTW) đã cấp và còn hiệu lực
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบใบอนุญาตทำงานที่ใช้ความร้อน (PTW) ออกแล้วและยังไม่หมดอายุ
baseline.content_id: Pastikan permit to work (PTW) hot work telah dikeluarkan dan masih berlaku

scenarios.content: 허가서 없이 임의 용접 진행 → 가연물 인근 작업으로 화재
scenarios.content_en: Unauthorized welding near combustibles leads to fire
scenarios.content_vi: Hàn tự ý không có giấy phép gần vật liệu dễ cháy gây hỏa hoạn
scenarios.content_th: การเชื่อมโดยไม่มีใบอนุญาตใกล้วัสดุติดไฟทำให้เกิดไฟไหม้
scenarios.content_id: Pengelasan tanpa izin di dekat material mudah terbakar menyebabkan kebakaran

mitigations.content: PTW 사본 작업 위치 게시 + 유효시간 내 작업 종료
mitigations.content_en: Post PTW copy at the work location and finish work within validity
mitigations.content_vi: Niêm yết bản sao PTW tại vị trí làm việc và hoàn tất trong thời hạn hiệu lực
mitigations.content_th: ติดสำเนา PTW ที่จุดทำงานและให้งานเสร็จสิ้นภายในเวลาที่กำหนด
mitigations.content_id: Tempel salinan PTW di lokasi kerja dan selesaikan dalam masa berlaku

baseline.content: 작업 반경 11m 이내 가연물 제거 또는 불연포 보양
baseline.content_en: Remove combustibles within 11m radius or cover with fire blankets
baseline.content_vi: Dọn vật liệu dễ cháy trong bán kính 11m hoặc che bằng bạt chống cháy
baseline.content_th: เคลื่อนย้ายวัสดุติดไฟในรัศมี 11 เมตรหรือคลุมด้วยผ้าทนไฟ
baseline.content_id: Singkirkan material mudah terbakar dalam radius 11m atau tutup dengan fire blanket
baseline.regulation: 추정: KOSHA P-93, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 가연물 잔존 상태 용접 불티 비산 → 화재 발생
scenarios.content_en: Welding sparks scatter to remaining combustibles and ignite a fire
scenarios.content_vi: Tia hàn bắn vào vật liệu dễ cháy còn sót lại gây hỏa hoạn
scenarios.content_th: ประกายไฟจากการเชื่อมกระเด็นไปยังวัสดุติดไฟที่ยังเหลืออยู่ทำให้เกิดไฟไหม้
scenarios.content_id: Percikan api las menyebar ke material mudah terbakar yang tersisa dan memicu kebakaran

mitigations.content: 11m 이내 가연물 이동 + 불연포 2겹 보양 후 점화
mitigations.content_en: Move combustibles within 11m and cover with 2 layers of fire blanket before ignition
mitigations.content_vi: Di chuyển vật liệu dễ cháy trong 11m và phủ 2 lớp bạt chống cháy trước khi mồi lửa
mitigations.content_th: เคลื่อนย้ายวัสดุติดไฟในระยะ 11 เมตรและคลุมผ้าทนไฟ 2 ชั้นก่อนจุดไฟ
mitigations.content_id: Pindahkan material mudah terbakar dalam 11m dan tutup 2 lapis fire blanket sebelum penyalaan

ppe.content_th: ผ้ากันเปื้อนหนังสำหรับงานเชื่อม

baseline.content_en: Place fire extinguishers/hydrants adjacent to work area (2 or more)
baseline.content_vi: Đặt bình chữa cháy/họng nước chữa cháy cạnh khu vực làm việc (từ 2 cái trở lên)
baseline.content_th: วางถังดับเพลิงและหัวจ่ายน้ำดับเพลิงใกล้พื้นที่ทำงาน (อย่างน้อย 2 ชุด)
baseline.content_id: Tempatkan APAR/hydran berdekatan dengan area kerja (minimal 2 unit)

scenarios.content: 초동 진화 지연으로 소규모 화재가 인근 가연물로 확산
scenarios.content_en: Delayed initial response lets a small fire spread to nearby combustibles
scenarios.content_vi: Phản ứng ban đầu chậm khiến đám cháy nhỏ lan sang vật liệu dễ cháy lân cận
scenarios.content_th: การดับเพลิงเริ่มต้นล่าช้าทำให้ไฟลามไปยังวัสดุติดไฟใกล้เคียง
scenarios.content_id: Respons awal yang terlambat membuat api kecil menyebar ke material mudah terbakar di sekitarnya

mitigations.content: ABC급 소화기 2개 + 소화전 호스 길이 확보 사전 배치
mitigations.content_en: Pre-position 2 ABC fire extinguishers and ensure hydrant hose reach
mitigations.content_vi: Bố trí sẵn 2 bình chữa cháy loại ABC và đảm bảo độ dài vòi họng nước
mitigations.content_th: เตรียมถังดับเพลิงชนิด ABC 2 ถังและจัดสายส่งน้ำให้มีความยาวเพียงพอ
mitigations.content_id: Siapkan 2 APAR tipe ABC dan pastikan panjang selang hydran mencukupi

baseline.content: 화재감시자 배치 및 작업 종료 후 30분 이상 잔불 점검
baseline.content_en: Assign fire watcher and inspect for embers for at least 30 minutes after work
baseline.content_vi: Bố trí người giám sát hỏa hoạn và kiểm tra tàn lửa ít nhất 30 phút sau khi kết thúc
baseline.content_th: จัดผู้เฝ้าระวังไฟและตรวจสอบขี้เถ้าอย่างน้อย 30 นาทีหลังเสร็จงาน
baseline.content_id: Tugaskan fire watcher dan periksa bara api minimal 30 menit setelah pekerjaan selesai

scenarios.content: 작업 종료 후 잔불 미확인으로 야간 재발화
scenarios.content_en: Unchecked embers after work cause re-ignition at night
scenarios.content_vi: Không kiểm tra tàn lửa sau khi xong việc dẫn đến cháy lại vào ban đêm
scenarios.content_th: ไม่ตรวจสอบขี้เถ้าหลังเสร็จงานทำให้เกิดไฟไหม้ซ้ำในเวลากลางคืน
scenarios.content_id: Bara yang tidak diperiksa setelah kerja menyebabkan kebakaran ulang di malam hari

mitigations.content: 전담 화재감시자 + 종료 후 30분 잔불 순찰 기록
mitigations.content_en: Dedicated fire watcher with 30-minute post-work ember patrol log
mitigations.content_vi: Người giám sát hỏa hoạn chuyên trách và ghi nhận tuần tra tàn lửa 30 phút sau khi xong
mitigations.content_th: ผู้เฝ้าระวังไฟเฉพาะกิจและบันทึกการตรวจขี้เถ้า 30 นาทีหลังเสร็จงาน
mitigations.content_id: Fire watcher khusus dan catat patroli bara 30 menit setelah pekerjaan

ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ hàn (cấp che sáng từ 9 trở lên)
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากเชื่อม (เกรดกรองแสง 9 ขึ้นไป)
ppe.content_id: Topeng las (shade grade 9 atau lebih tinggi)

add.content: 밀폐공간 화기작업 — 가스농도 측정 및 환기 확인
add.content_en: Hot work in confined space — measure gas concentration and confirm ventilation
add.content_vi: Công việc sinh nhiệt trong không gian hạn chế — đo nồng độ khí và xác nhận thông gió
add.content_th: งานใช้ความร้อนในที่อับอากาศ — วัดความเข้มข้นก๊าซและตรวจสอบการระบายอากาศ
add.content_id: Hot work di confined space — ukur konsentrasi gas dan pastikan ventilasi

baseline.content: 굴착작업 전 지하 매설물(전기·가스·통신) 사전조사 및 도면 확인
baseline.content_en: Survey underground utilities (power/gas/comms) and review drawings before excavation
baseline.content_vi: Khảo sát công trình ngầm (điện/khí/viễn thông) và xem bản vẽ trước khi đào
baseline.content_th: สำรวจสาธารณูปโภคใต้ดิน (ไฟฟ้า/แก๊ส/สื่อสาร) และตรวจสอบแบบก่อนการขุด
baseline.content_id: Survei utilitas bawah tanah (listrik/gas/komunikasi) dan periksa gambar sebelum penggalian

scenarios.content: 도면 미확인 굴착 시 가스관 손상 → 가스 누출/폭발
scenarios.content_en: Excavating without checking drawings damages gas pipe causing leak or explosion
scenarios.content_vi: Đào không kiểm tra bản vẽ làm hỏng đường ống khí gây rò rỉ hoặc nổ
scenarios.content_th: ขุดดินโดยไม่ตรวจแบบทำให้ท่อแก๊สเสียหายเกิดการรั่วหรือระเบิด
scenarios.content_id: Penggalian tanpa cek gambar merusak pipa gas menyebabkan kebocoran atau ledakan

mitigations.content: 관할 지자체 도면 + 시굴 점검 후 굴착 착수
mitigations.content_en: Obtain local authority drawings and perform trial pit before starting excavation
mitigations.content_vi: Lấy bản vẽ của chính quyền địa phương và đào thăm dò trước khi bắt đầu
mitigations.content_th: ขอแบบจากหน่วยงานท้องถิ่นและทำหลุมทดลองก่อนเริ่มขุดจริง
mitigations.content_id: Dapatkan gambar dari otoritas setempat dan lakukan trial pit sebelum penggalian dimulai

baseline.content: 흙막이 지보공 설치 또는 굴착면 기울기 준수(흙 종류별)
baseline.content_en: Install earth retaining shoring or maintain slope angle per soil type
baseline.content_vi: Lắp hệ chống vách đất hoặc duy trì độ dốc mái dốc theo loại đất
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้งระบบค้ำยันดินหรือรักษามุมลาดเอียงตามชนิดของดิน
baseline.content_id: Pasang shoring penahan tanah atau pertahankan kemiringan sesuai jenis tanah

scenarios.content: 흙막이 미설치/기울기 미준수로 굴착면 붕괴 → 작업자 매몰
scenarios.content_en: Excavation face collapses without shoring or proper slope, burying worker
scenarios.content_vi: Mái đào sụp đổ do không có hệ chống hoặc sai độ dốc, vùi lấp công nhân
scenarios.content_th: หน้าขุดถล่มเนื่องจากไม่มีค้ำยันหรือไม่ได้ลาดตามมาตรฐาน ผู้ปฏิบัติงานถูกฝัง
scenarios.content_id: Dinding galian runtuh karena tidak ada shoring atau kemiringan tidak sesuai, pekerja tertimbun

mitigations.content: 토질 확인 후 기울기 1:1.2 이하 또는 흙막이 설치 후 진입
mitigations.content_en: Check soil and either keep slope 1:1.2 or less, or install shoring before entry
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra đất và giữ độ dốc 1:1.2 trở xuống hoặc lắp hệ chống trước khi vào
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบดินและรักษามุมลาด 1:1.2 หรือต่ำกว่า หรือติดตั้งค้ำยันก่อนเข้าทำงาน
mitigations.content_id: Periksa tanah dan jaga kemiringan 1:1.2 atau lebih landai, atau pasang shoring sebelum masuk

ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย (รัดสายคาง)

baseline.content: 굴착면 단부 안전난간 또는 출입금지 표시
baseline.content_en: Install guardrails or no-entry signage at excavation edges
baseline.content_vi: Lắp lan can an toàn hoặc biển cấm vào khu vực mép hố đào
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้งราวกันตกหรือป้ายห้ามเข้าที่ขอบหน้าขุด
baseline.content_id: Pasang railing pengaman atau rambu larangan masuk di tepi galian

scenarios.content: 야간/우천 시 굴착면 단부 미인지로 통행자 추락
scenarios.content_en: Pedestrian fails to recognize edge at night or in rain and falls into excavation
scenarios.content_vi: Người đi bộ không nhận ra mép hố đào ban đêm hoặc khi mưa và rơi xuống
scenarios.content_th: ผู้สัญจรไม่เห็นขอบหน้าขุดในเวลากลางคืนหรือฝนตกแล้วตกลงไป
scenarios.content_id: Pejalan kaki tidak menyadari tepi galian di malam hari atau saat hujan dan terjatuh

mitigations.content: 단부 90cm 안전난간 + 점멸 라이트 + 출입금지 표지 설치
mitigations.content_en: Install 90cm guardrail, flashing light, and no-entry signage at edges
mitigations.content_vi: Lắp lan can 90cm, đèn nháy và biển cấm vào tại các mép hố
mitigations.content_th: ติดตั้งราวกันตกสูง 90 ซม. ไฟกะพริบ และป้ายห้ามเข้าที่ขอบ
mitigations.content_id: Pasang railing 90cm, lampu kedip, dan rambu larangan masuk di tepi

baseline.content: 굴착 깊이 1.5m 이상 시 승강설비(사다리) 확보
baseline.content_en: Provide ladder access when excavation depth is 1.5m or more
baseline.content_vi: Bố trí thang lên xuống khi độ sâu đào từ 1.5m trở lên
baseline.content_th: จัดบันไดขึ้นลงเมื่อความลึกการขุดตั้งแต่ 1.5 เมตรขึ้นไป
baseline.content_id: Sediakan tangga akses saat kedalaman galian 1.5m atau lebih
baseline.regulation: 추정: KOSHA C-104, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 사다리 미설치 깊은 굴착부에서 비상 탈출 지연
scenarios.content_en: Delayed emergency egress from deep excavation without ladder
scenarios.content_vi: Chậm thoát hiểm từ hố đào sâu do không có thang
scenarios.content_th: การหนีออกฉุกเฉินจากหลุมขุดที่ลึกล่าช้าเพราะไม่มีบันได
scenarios.content_id: Evakuasi darurat dari galian dalam tertunda karena tidak ada tangga

mitigations.content: 굴착 깊이 1.5m 이상 시 8m 이내 간격 사다리 1개 이상 확보
mitigations.content_en: When excavation depth is 1.5m+, provide at least 1 ladder within every 8m interval
mitigations.content_vi: Khi độ sâu đào từ 1.5m, bố trí ít nhất 1 thang trong khoảng cách 8m
mitigations.content_th: เมื่อความลึกขุดตั้งแต่ 1.5 เมตร ต้องมีบันไดอย่างน้อย 1 อันต่อระยะทุก 8 เมตร
mitigations.content_id: Saat kedalaman galian 1.5m+, sediakan minimal 1 tangga setiap interval 8m

add.content: 굴착 2m 이상 — 산소농도 측정 및 환기, 신호수 배치
add.content_en: Excavation 2m+ — measure oxygen concentration, ventilate, and assign signal person
add.content_vi: Đào từ 2m — đo nồng độ oxy, thông gió và bố trí người ra hiệu
add.content_th: ขุดดินตั้งแต่ 2 เมตร — วัดความเข้มข้นออกซิเจน ระบายอากาศ และจัดผู้ให้สัญญาณ
add.content_id: Galian 2m+ — ukur konsentrasi oksigen, ventilasi, dan tugaskan signal man
